summary: Virtual Classroom Module Batch 1 testing completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Digital Mushaf component verified working with api.quran.com integration. Fixed a critical bug in auth/register endpoint where MongoDB ObjectId was not being serialized correctly, causing 520 errors.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in auth/register endpoint
/app/backend/tests/test_classroom_module.py - New test file for Virtual Classroom Module

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Landing page, Teacher dashboard, Digital Mushaf all working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique UUIDs for isolation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual Classroom Module Batch 1 is complete. All classroom APIs tested: /api/classroom/next-class (auth), /api/classroom/sessions/create, /api/classroom/session/{id}, /api/classroom/session/{id}/progress (teacher only), /api/classroom/session/{id}/rate (student only), /api/classroom/student/{id}/progress, /api/classroom/activities (admin create, all list), /api/classroom/admin/sessions (admin only). Booking creates ClassSession automatically. Digital Mushaf renders correctly with api.quran.com integration for Arabic text (604 pages). QuranNavigator provides Surah/Page/Juz navigation.

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not JSON serializable in auth/register response
bugs_fixed.fix: Added user_doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one and changed created_at to isoformat string

classroom_apis.GET /api/classroom/next-class: Returns session with is_joinable flag (auth required)

booking_integration.POST /api/booking/create: Auto-creates ClassSession when booking is made

frontend_components.Digital Mushaf: Renders Arabic Quran text, page navigation works
